name: Vireo Health International, Inc.
summary: Vireo Health International Inc. operates as a physician-led cannabis company in the United States. It cultivates cannabis; manufactures pharmaceutical-grade cannabis extracts; and sells its products through its network of Green Goods and other retail locations, and third-party dispensaries. The company grows and/or processes cannabis in eight markets and operates 16 dispensaries. Vireo Health International Inc. is headquartered in Minneapolis, Minnesota.
